@@ -258,5 +258,10 @@
     "quote": "Set up Clawdbot, an AI assistant that runs locally on my Mac. Named him Jarvis. He handles daily briefings, checks my calendar, and reminds me when to leave for pickleball based on traffic.",
     "author": "BraydonCoyer",
     "url": "https://x.com/BraydonCoyer/status/2008537198061379720"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "The truth is that a megacorp like Anthropic or OpenAI could not build @clawdbot, it's literally impossible with how the corpo works, even with AI-assisted engineering.",
+    "author": "Dimillian",
+    "url": "https://x.com/Dimillian/status/2008446638172340398"
   }
 ]
